'''Smarck''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], [[Cademimu sector/Legends|Cademimu sector]], [[Smarck system/Legends|Smarck system]].

For several years, [[Macus Kayniph]] was in charge of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] operations on Smarck. Black Sun kept a storehouse of [[Spaarti cloning cylinder]]s on the planet.

==Appearances==
*[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 2|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 2]] {{1st}}
*[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 5|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 5]]
